tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.version_description: It's just capo on 3 and Em C B7 the whole way through.

content:
[Intro]
[ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]G/D[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]


[Verse]
[tab]   [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]G/D[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
Hello, it's me.[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]G/D[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]                 [ch]C[/ch]          [ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]G/D[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]
I was wondering if after all these years you'd like to meet, to go over everything[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Em[/ch]             [ch]G/D[/ch]                     [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]
They say that time's supposed to heal you, but I ain't done much healing.[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]G/D[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]
Hello, can you hear me?[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Em[/ch]        [ch]G/D[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]                  [ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]G/D[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]
I'm in California dreaming about who we used to be when we were younger and free.[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Em[/ch]        [ch]G/D[/ch]                [ch]D[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]
I've forgotten how it felt before the world fell at our feet.[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab]                [ch]Em[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]Bm[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]
There's such a difference between us[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]
and a million miles.[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]         [ch]G/D[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
Hello from the other side,[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Em[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]          [ch]G/D[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
I must've called a thousand times to tell you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]G/D[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]
I'm sorry, for everything that I've done,[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Em[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]G/D[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
But when I call you never seem to be home.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]      [ch]G/D[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
Hello from the outside,[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Em[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]             [ch]G/D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
At least I can say that I've tried to tell you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]         [ch]G/D[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]
I'm sorry, for breaking your heart[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Em[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]             [ch]G/D[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]
But it don't matter, it clearly doesn't tear you apart anymore.[/tab]


[Instrumental]
[ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]G/D[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]


[Verse]
[tab]   [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]G/D[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]
Hello, how are you?[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Em[/ch]       [ch]G/D[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]
It's so typical of me to talk about myself, I'm sorry[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]G/D[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]
I hope that you're well[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]G/D[/ch]                      [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]
Did you ever make it out of that town where nothing ever happened?[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab]         [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]Bm[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]
It's no secret that the both of us[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Em[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]
are running out of time.[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]    [ch]Em[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]         [ch]G/D[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
So, hello from the other side,[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Em[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]          [ch]G/D[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
I must've called a thousand times to tell you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]G/D[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]
I'm sorry, for everything that I've done,[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Em[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]G/D[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
But when I call you never seem to be home.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]      [ch]G/D[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
Hello from the outside,[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Em[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]             [ch]G/D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
At least I can say that I've tried to tell you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]         [ch]G/D[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]
I'm sorry, for breaking your heart[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Em[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]             [ch]G/D[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]
But it don't matter, it clearly doesn't tear you apart anymore.[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]G/D[/ch]
Anymore oh         ooooohh[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]G/D[/ch]
Anymore oh         ooooohh[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]G/D[/ch]
Anymore oh         ooooohh[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Em[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
Anymore ohhhh        anymore[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]    [ch]Em[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]         [ch]G/D[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
So, hello from the other side,[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Em[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]          [ch]G/D[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
I must've called a thousand times to tell you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]G/D[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]
I'm sorry, for everything that I've done,[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Em[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]G/D[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
But when I call you never seem to be home.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]      [ch]G/D[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
Hello from the outside,[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Em[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]             [ch]G/D[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
At least I can say that I've tried to tell you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]         [ch]G/D[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]
I'm sorry, for breaking your heart[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Em[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]             [ch]G/D[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]
But it don't matter, it clearly doesn't tear you apart anymore.[/tab]


[Outro]
[ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]G/D[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]Em[/ch]
